name: Devastating Strike
effect: +1d8 bonus damage on a melee attack. Scales: 2d8 at L10, 3d8 at L17.
narration_cue: Steel meets flesh with a bone-jarring crunch.

name: Rallying Shout
effect: One ally gains advantage on their next attack roll.
narration_cue: A booming command rings out and an ally's grip tightens.

name: Shield Bash
effect: Melee attack that stuns for 1 round on hit (CON save negates).
narration_cue: A shield slams forward and the foe reels, dazed.

name: Second Wind
effect: Heal self 1d10 + level HP. Once per combat.
narration_cue: A ragged breath, a surge of grit, wounds knitting shut.

name: Brace for Impact
effect: Reaction when hit: reduce the damage by 1d6 + CON mod.
narration_cue: Boots dig in, muscles lock, the blow glances off.

name: Opportunity Strike
effect: Reaction when an enemy moves away: make a free melee attack.
narration_cue: The enemy turns to flee and a blade catches them mid-step.

name: Cleaving Blow
effect: A single melee attack hits up to 2 adjacent enemies.
narration_cue: One sweeping arc bites through two foes at once.

name: Precision Strike
effect: Gain advantage on your next attack. Best against high-AC targets.
narration_cue: Eyes narrow, finding the gap in the armor.

name: Taunt
effect: Force one enemy to attack you for 1 round (WIS save negates).
narration_cue: A jeer cuts deep and the foe turns, seeing only you.

name: Reckless Assault
effect: Advantage on all attacks this round, but attacks against you also have advantage.
narration_cue: All caution thrown aside, a furious, open-guard onslaught.

name: War Cry
effect: All enemies in earshot: WIS save or Frightened 1 round.
narration_cue: A roar that rattles the ribs of everyone who hears it.

name: Unstoppable Charge
effect: Double-speed move in a straight line + attack. Target STR save or knocked prone.
narration_cue: A thundering rush that bowls the enemy off their feet.

name: Whirlwind
effect: Attack every enemy within melee range (one roll per target).
narration_cue: A spinning storm of steel, striking all around.

name: Iron Stance
effect: Until next turn: can't be moved, advantage on saves, resistance to all damage.
narration_cue: Feet planted like roots, an immovable wall of iron.

name: Protective Strike
effect: Melee attack; on hit, target has disadvantage attacking anyone but you until next turn.
narration_cue: A challenging blow that dares the foe to look elsewhere.

name: Shield Wall
effect: Until next turn, you and all allies within 5 ft gain +2 AC. Requires shield.
narration_cue: A shield raised high, and the line holds behind it.

name: Stand Your Ground
effect: Plant yourself: can't be moved, +2 all saves, but can't move voluntarily. Until next turn.
narration_cue: Heels dug in, a vow muttered: not one step back.

name: Rallying Defense
effect: All allies in earshot gain temp HP equal to CON mod + proficiency bonus until next short rest.
narration_cue: A steadying shout, and the party stands a little taller.

name: Intercept
effect: Reaction when an ally within 5 ft is hit: take the damage instead (your damage reductions apply).
narration_cue: A body thrown into the path of the blow.

name: Retaliating Shield
effect: Reaction when hit by a melee attack: attacker takes 1d6 + STR mod. Requires shield.
narration_cue: The shield rebounds, and the attacker grunts in pain.

name: Taunt
effect: Force one enemy to attack you for 1 round (WIS save negates).
narration_cue: A goading bellow that fixes the foe's gaze on you.

name: Body Block
effect: Move 10 ft and block a passage. No creature can pass your space until next turn.
narration_cue: A broad frame fills the doorway; none shall pass.

name: Challenging Shout
effect: All enemies within 15 ft: WIS save or must include you as a target if attacking this round.
narration_cue: A thunderous challenge that no foe can ignore.

name: Fortify
effect: Grant one ally within 30 ft resistance to the next damage instance (half damage).
narration_cue: A shouted warning braces an ally against the coming hit.

name: Unbreakable
effect: For 2 rounds all damage to you is halved; you can't attack during this time.
narration_cue: Teeth gritted, weathering the storm by sheer will.

name: Inspiring Presence
effect: All allies in earshot gain +1 to attack rolls. Lasts 3 rounds.
narration_cue: Your steadiness spreads; the whole party fights bolder.

name: Avenger's Mark
effect: When an ally drops to 0 HP, your next attack deals double damage.
narration_cue: A comrade falls, and cold fury sharpens your strike.

name: Living Fortress
effect: 10 ft zone for 2 rounds: allies +2 AC and advantage on saves, enemies -2 to attacks. Can't move.
narration_cue: You become the eye of the storm, a bastion of calm.

name: Hit and Run
effect: Melee attack, then move 15 ft without provoking reactions.
narration_cue: A quick strike, then gone before they can answer.

name: Flanking Strike
effect: If an ally is adjacent to the target: advantage + 1d6 damage.
narration_cue: You slip to the foe's blind side as your ally distracts.

name: Disengage
effect: Move at full speed without provoking opportunity attacks.
narration_cue: A fluid backstep, untouchable as you withdraw.

name: Momentum
effect: Until end of turn: each enemy hit grants +5 ft movement and +1 to next attack.
narration_cue: Each hit feeds the next; you blur across the field.

name: Sidestep
effect: Reaction when targeted by a melee attack: move 5 ft. If out of range, the attack auto-misses.
narration_cue: A half-step aside, and the blade finds only air.

name: Riposte
effect: Reaction when an enemy misses a melee attack: make a free melee attack against them.
narration_cue: Their swing whiffs; your counter does not.

name: Hamstring
effect: On hit, target's speed is halved for 2 rounds (CON save each turn).
narration_cue: A low cut across the leg; the foe staggers, slowed.

name: Dual Strike
effect: Two attacks with light weapons, same or different targets.
narration_cue: Both blades flash in a single breath.

name: Throwing Mastery
effect: Throw a weapon at range with no disadvantage and draw another for free.
narration_cue: A blade spins out; another's already in hand.

name: Tumbling Assault
effect: Move through enemy spaces; each enemy passed takes a free attack at -2.
narration_cue: You roll and weave through the melee, blade trailing.

name: Spring Attack
effect: Move, attack at any point, then move again. Total up to double speed.
narration_cue: A darting strike between two bursts of motion.

name: Whirlwind
effect: Attack every enemy in melee range (one roll per target).
narration_cue: A spinning flurry that touches everyone near.

name: Predator's Pursuit
effect: Mark an enemy: always know its position, +1d6 damage against it. Until death or combat ends.
narration_cue: You lock onto your prey; there is nowhere it can hide.

name: Evasive Sprint
effect: Dash + advantage on DEX saves + 4 AC until next turn.
narration_cue: A breathless, weaving sprint no attack can pin down.

name: Cunning Action
effect: Dash, disengage, or hide as a quick action (in addition to your main action).
narration_cue: A flicker of motion, gone into shadow or sprint.

name: Precise Strike
effect: Gain advantage on your next attack. Enables Sneak Attack solo.
narration_cue: You find the soft spot and wait for the opening.

name: Uncanny Dodge
effect: Reaction when hit by a visible attack: halve the damage.
narration_cue: You twist with the blow, robbing it of force.

name: Slippery
effect: Reaction to a restrain/grapple effect: automatically escape.
narration_cue: A shrug and a slither, and the hold is broken.

name: Dirty Trick
effect: Target has disadvantage on their next action.
narration_cue: Sand in the eyes, a stomped foot, a cheap shot.

name: Quick Fingers
effect: Sleight of Hand as a quick action. Steal, plant, or swap mid-combat.
narration_cue: A hand darts in and out; something has changed.

name: Smoke Bomb
effect: 10 ft obscurement cloud; attacks through it have disadvantage. Lasts 1 round.
narration_cue: A glass vial shatters and grey smoke billows up.

name: Crippling Strike
effect: On hit, target's speed is halved until the end of their next turn.
narration_cue: A precise cut to the tendon leaves the foe limping.

name: Shadow Step
effect: Move undetected to a new position. Must end in cover or shadow.
narration_cue: You melt into one shadow and emerge from another.

name: Exploit Weakness
effect: Study for 1 round, then a Sneak Attack deals maximum damage (no roll).
narration_cue: You watch, you learn, and then you strike true.

name: Vanish
effect: Become fully hidden mid-combat. Break all targeting.
narration_cue: Between one heartbeat and the next, you simply aren't there.

name: Blade Flurry
effect: 3 quick attacks at -2 each. Each can trigger Sneak Attack if conditions are met.
narration_cue: A rapid triple cut, blades singing.

name: Honeyed Words
effect: Advantage on next Deception/Persuasion/Intimidation. In combat: target disadvantage next action (WIS save).
narration_cue: A warm, disarming smile and words like silk.

name: Backstab
effect: Attack a creature that considers you an ally: +2d6 + Stunned 1 round (no save — betrayal).
narration_cue: A friendly hand on the shoulder, then a blade between the ribs.

name: Quick Change
effect: Swap to a different identity as a quick action: voice, mannerisms, apparent equipment.
narration_cue: A turned collar, a new posture, and a different person stands there.

name: Extract Information
effect: Conversation: Deception vs Insight. Success reveals one hidden thing; failure, the NPC notices probing.
narration_cue: An idle question, asked just so, and a secret slips loose.

name: Plausible Deniability
effect: Reaction when accused/confronted: Deception. Success: the accuser doubts their evidence.
narration_cue: A wounded, baffled look: surely you'd never.

name: Slippery
effect: Reaction when restrained/grappled: automatically escape.
narration_cue: A practiced twist, and the grip closes on nothing.

name: Poison Craft
effect: Apply poison to weapon or drink. Next hit: 2d6 poison + Poisoned (CON save).
narration_cue: A bead of something dark, smeared along the edge.

name: Misdirection
effect: Plant false evidence or a trail. Investigators follow the planted lead (Deception vs Investigation).
narration_cue: A dropped token, a forged note, a trail leading nowhere.

name: Lip Reading
effect: Understand visible conversations you can't hear — through glass, across rooms.
narration_cue: Across the crowded hall, you read every silent word.

name: Garrote
effect: From hidden: a silent attack that grapples and silences. 1d6/round. STR save to escape.
narration_cue: A wire loops the throat; no cry escapes.

name: Double Agent
effect: In a cover identity: convince an NPC to switch allegiance for the encounter. Contested CHA.
narration_cue: A whispered offer, and a loyalty quietly changes hands.

name: Vanish in Plain Sight
effect: End combat by disappearing into a crowd or environment. Requires 3+ non-hostiles or cover.
narration_cue: You step into the throng and become no one at all.

name: Whisper Network
effect: In a settlement: learn 2 rumors (1 true, 1 partial) and who is asking about you.
narration_cue: A few coins, a few contacts, and the city starts talking.

name: Sleeper Strike
effect: Social scene: mark a target (Sleight of Hand). Within 1 hour, trigger unconsciousness for 1 min (CON save).
narration_cue: A brush of contact now; an hour later, they crumple.

name: Arcane Bolt
effect: Free baseline ranged arcane attack. Cantrip; scales with level.
narration_cue: A spoken word, and a lance of raw force snaps outward.

name: Shield Spell
effect: Reaction: raise an arcane barrier against an incoming attack. The unarmored caster's lifeline.
narration_cue: A shimmering disc of force flares into being just in time.

name: Counterspell
effect: Reaction: negate an enemy spell as it is cast. The Mage's anti-magic role.
narration_cue: A sharp counter-word, and the enemy's magic unravels.

name: Thorn Whip
effect: Ranged cantrip that lashes and pulls the target toward you.
narration_cue: A whip of thorned vine cracks out and yanks the foe close.

name: Healing Touch
effect: Heal a touched ally. Core to the Primal source identity.
narration_cue: Green light blooms beneath your hand and wounds close.

name: Bark Skin
effect: Reaction: skin hardens to bark, reducing an incoming hit. Druid survivability.
narration_cue: Your skin roughens to ridged bark as the blow lands.

name: Wild Shape
effect: Transform into a beast form. THE Druid identity ability.
narration_cue: Bone and fur reshape; a beast stands where you stood.

name: Sacred Flame
effect: Free divine cantrip. WIS save; ignores armor (divine magic bypasses physical defense).
narration_cue: A column of pale fire falls from nowhere onto the foe.

name: Heal Wounds
effect: Heal a target. The Cleric's primary identity.
narration_cue: Warm light pours from your palms and flesh mends.

name: Shield of Faith
effect: Reaction: grant an ally +2 AC when attacked. Core divine protection.
narration_cue: A faint halo of light wraps an ally as the strike comes.

name: Arcane Bolt
effect: Shared Arcane cantrip, fired through a tool or device.
narration_cue: A device hums, then spits a bolt of arcane force.

name: Deploy Construct
effect: Summon a steel defender: HP = 3x level, AC 15, 1d6+INT attack. Acts on your turn. One active. THE Artificer ability.
narration_cue: Folded metal unfurls into a clanking steel guardian.

name: Infuse Item
effect: Touch a nonmagical weapon/armor: +1 attack/damage or +1 AC until long rest.
narration_cue: Runes flare along the steel and settle into a steady glow.

name: Arcane Bolt
effect: Cantrip; on hit, learn one mechanical property of the target (AC, lowest save, or HP fraction).
narration_cue: A probing bolt strikes, and the foe's weakness reveals itself.

name: Detect Magic
effect: Reveal active magic, Resonance levels, and Veil integrity.
narration_cue: The world brightens with threads of unseen power.

name: Identify
effect: Touch: learn all magical properties, enchantments, curses, creation history, and Hollow corruption stage.
narration_cue: Your fingers trace the object and its whole history unfolds.

name: Thorn Whip
effect: Cantrip; pull targets toward your companion for Pack Tactics.
narration_cue: A thorned lash drags the foe into your companion's reach.

name: Command Companion
effect: Direct your companion: Attack (1d6+WIS), Dash, Dodge, Guard, or Scout.
narration_cue: A sharp word and a gesture; your companion springs to it.

name: Healing Touch
effect: Shared Primal healing. Can target yourself or your companion.
narration_cue: Green warmth flows from your hand into fur or flesh.

name: Shillelagh
effect: Cantrip: your staff uses WIS and deals 1d8 damage. Warden melee identity.
narration_cue: Your staff thrums with primal weight, heavy as oak.

name: Guardian Strike
effect: Melee attack; on hit, the terrain erupts and the target's next attack has disadvantage.
narration_cue: The ground buckles at your strike, throwing the foe off-balance.

name: Bark Skin
effect: Reaction: skin hardens to bark, reducing an incoming hit.
narration_cue: Bark sheathes your skin in an instant of rough armor.

name: Sacred Flame
effect: Free shared divine cantrip. WIS save; ignores armor.
narration_cue: A shaft of cold starlight strikes down on the foe.

name: Fate's Nudge
effect: After a d20 is rolled, before narration: add or subtract 1d4 from the result.
narration_cue: A thread of fate twitches, and the outcome shifts.

name: Shield of Faith
effect: Reaction: grant an ally +2 AC when attacked.
narration_cue: A whispered prayer and a faint shimmer guards an ally.

name: Cutting Words
effect: Signature cantrip: 1d4 psychic + target -1d4 on their next roll.
narration_cue: A barbed quip lands harder than any blade.

name: Inspire
effect: Grant an ally a die to add to any roll. THE Bard ability.
narration_cue: A few ringing words, and an ally stands ready to shine.

name: Mass Inspire
effect: Grant Inspiration to the whole party. The Bard's supreme support moment.
narration_cue: A soaring refrain lifts every heart in earshot.

name: Dissonant Whisper
effect: Protective reaction: a discordant note disrupts an enemy. Bards disrupt, not block.
narration_cue: A jarring, off-key whisper makes the foe flinch.

name: Countercharm
effect: Reaction when an ally is targeted by fear/charm: grant advantage on the save.
narration_cue: A steadying melody cuts through the fear.

name: Song of Rest
effect: During a short rest: all allies regain an extra 1d8 HP. The support bard.
narration_cue: A soft lullaby eases the aches of the road.

name: Cutting Retort
effect: When an enemy hits an ally: deal 1d6 psychic + target has disadvantage on next attack. The combat bard.
narration_cue: A withering comeback snaps the attacker's focus.

name: Silver Tongue
effect: Outside combat: advantage on your next Persuasion or Deception check. Reusable. The social bard.
narration_cue: Words flow like honey; doors and hearts open.

name: Mocking Flourish
effect: After an ally hits a target: deal 1d4 psychic and the target can't take reactions. The coordination bard.
narration_cue: A mocking flourish leaves the foe too rattled to respond.

name: Sacred Flame
effect: Divine ranged cantrip option.
narration_cue: A pillar of holy light crashes down on the foe.

name: Divine Smite

cost.scaling: Variable on melee hit: 2 Focus=+1d8, 4 Focus=+2d8, 6 Focus=+3d8 radiant; +1d8 vs Hollow/undead.

effect: On a melee hit, channel radiant damage. THE Paladin ability.
narration_cue: The blade blazes white and sears with holy wrath.

name: Lay on Hands

cost.scaling: Stamina-pool ability: healing pool = 5 x level HP; or spend 5 pts to cure disease/poison. Resets on long rest.

effect: Touch to heal from a dedicated pool, or spend points to cure disease/poison.
narration_cue: You lay calloused hands on the wound and warmth flows in.

name: Shield of Faith
effect: Reaction: grant an ally +2 AC when attacked. Shared divine protection.
narration_cue: A radiant ward flares around your charge.

name: Shield Bash
effect: Shared martial stun attack: melee, stuns 1 round on hit (CON save negates).
narration_cue: A holy shield slams home and the foe staggers.

name: Zealous Charge
effect: Double-speed line move + melee at the end. On hit: +1d6 radiant.
narration_cue: A headlong, righteous charge trailing holy light.

name: Cleansing Strike
effect: On hit: remove one negative condition from yourself.
narration_cue: The strike lands and a corruption sloughs away from you.

name: Sanctified Ground
effect: Create a Veil Ward (15 ft, 3 rounds). Emergency Veil reinforcement.
narration_cue: You plant your blade and hallowed ground spreads outward.

name: Commanding Presence
effect: All enemies within 15 ft: WIS save or can't move away for 1 round.
narration_cue: Your presence roots the foes where they stand.

name: Suggestion
effect: Plant a reasonable suggestion in a creature's mind (WIS save). It believes the idea was its own. Lasts 1 hour.
narration_cue: A quiet word slips in, and the thought feels like their own.

name: Mind Spike
effect: Cantrip: 1d6 psychic + you know the target's location for 1 round. No visible effect — just a headache.
narration_cue: The target winces at a sudden, sourceless pain behind the eyes.

name: Fog of Mind

cost.scaling: At L10+: erase up to 1 minute of memory.

effect: Target forgets the last 30 seconds (WIS save). On success they feel disoriented but remember.
narration_cue: The last moments slide out of the target's grasp like water.

name: Redirect Attention
effect: Up to 3 creatures ignore you or one designated person for 1 minute (WIS save). Not invisible — simply unimportant.
narration_cue: Eyes slide past you as if you were furniture.

name: Thought Shield
effect: Reaction when targeted by psychic damage or mind-reading: halve the damage or block the read.
narration_cue: Your thoughts close like a shuttered window.

name: Implant Doubt
effect: Reaction when an enemy succeeds an attack or ability: WIS save or they hesitate — reroll with disadvantage.
narration_cue: A seed of doubt: was that really the right move?

name: Compelling Argument
effect: Advantage on next Persuasion/Deception; success improves NPC disposition 1 step (permanent).
narration_cue: A reasoned, unhurried case that's hard to argue against.

name: De-escalate
effect: Target a hostile: CHA vs WIS. Success: combat pauses 1 round and you speak. May end combat.
narration_cue: Open hands, a calm voice: let's not do this.

name: Cutting Words
effect: Cantrip shared with Bard: 1d4 psychic + target -1d4 next roll. Your only reliable combat damage.
narration_cue: A precise, cutting remark that stings the foe.

name: Inspire
effect: Shared with Bard: grant an ally a die to add to any roll.
narration_cue: A few confident words, and an ally finds their footing.

name: Objection
effect: Reaction when an NPC is about to act against your wishes: Persuasion. Success: NPC hesitates 1 round. No effect on Hollow.
narration_cue: A sharp 'Wait —' that gives the room pause.

name: Countercharm
effect: Shared with Bard: ally vs fear/charm gains advantage on the save.
narration_cue: Steady, reassuring words break the spell's grip.

name: Mediator's Presence
effect: Two NPCs in conflict: Persuasion vs both. Success: both accept a compromise. Faction rep unchanged.
narration_cue: You step between the two and lower the temperature of the room.

name: Intimidating Authority
effect: Intimidation vs all enemies in earshot. Success: -2 to attacks for 1 round.
narration_cue: A commanding rebuke that makes foes second-guess themselves.

name: Rumor Mill
effect: In a settlement: plant a rumor that spreads within 24 hours. All local NPCs hear it.
narration_cue: A word here, a word there, and the city starts to talk.

name: Alliance Broker
effect: Convince an NPC to ally for one encounter or task. Advantage if you offer something they want.
narration_cue: A handshake sealed on mutual interest.

name: Treaty
effect: Binding agreement between two parties. CHA save to resist. Breaking it: disadvantage on all rolls for 24 hours.
narration_cue: Terms spoken aloud and sworn; the pact takes hold.

name: Incite
effect: Turn a crowd to a specific emotion. Persuasion vs highest WIS. Lasts 10 minutes.
narration_cue: Your words catch like fire and the crowd ignites.

name: Sanctuary of Words
effect: While speaking: no creature in earshot can take a hostile action (WIS save each round). Must keep talking.
narration_cue: As long as you keep speaking, no blade is drawn.

name: Undermine
effect: Target an authority figure: contested CHA. Success: their subordinates doubt their judgment for 1 hour.
narration_cue: A few well-placed words, and the leader's grip slips.

name: Direct Strike
effect: Name an ally and a target. That ally's next attack against that target has advantage and deals +1d4.
narration_cue: 'The one on the left — now!' and your ally pounces.

name: Reposition
effect: Command an ally to move 15 ft without provoking reactions. Resolved immediately.
narration_cue: 'Fall back to the doorway!' and they move as one.

name: Rally
effect: All allies within 30 ft gain temp HP equal to your CHA mod + level. Lasts until next rest.
narration_cue: 'Hold the line — we've got this!' and the party steadies.

name: Coordinated Assault
effect: Choose 2 allies. Both gain advantage on their next attack; if both hit the same target, +1d6 each.
narration_cue: Two allies strike together in a clean pincer.

name: Interceding Order
effect: Reaction when an ally is about to be hit: command them to dodge. +2 AC against that attack.
narration_cue: 'Duck!' and the blow sails over their head.

name: Countermand
effect: Reaction when an enemy uses a command/leadership ability: contested CHA. Success: the enemy's command fails.
narration_cue: Your voice cuts across theirs and their order dies.

name: Overwatch
effect: Designate a 15 ft area. Any ally in it gains +2 AC and advantage on saves until your next turn.
narration_cue: 'Stay behind that wall — I've got you covered.'

name: Exploit Opening
effect: When an ally crits: grant a different ally an immediate free attack against the same target.
narration_cue: 'Now — while it's staggered!'

name: War Cry
effect: All enemies within 30 ft: WIS save or Frightened 1 round. Allies also gain +1 to attacks that round.
narration_cue: A rallying roar that shakes the foe and lifts your own.

name: Field Medic Order
effect: Command an ally to use a healing item/ability as a declaration enhancer — they can attack AND heal in the same phase.
narration_cue: 'Drink the potion — I'll cover you.'

name: Grand Stratagem
effect: Declare a tactical plan. For 3 rounds, all allies within 30 ft gain +2 to attacks and +1 AC.
narration_cue: 'Listen carefully — on my signal...'

name: Sacrifice Play
effect: Command an ally to take a risky action: they take 2d6 damage but their next attack automatically crits.
narration_cue: 'Take the hit — make it count!'

name: Inspire Defiance
effect: All allies within 30 ft: advantage on saves vs Fear, Charm, and Stun for 2 rounds.
narration_cue: 'They want us afraid? Show them what afraid looks like.'

name: Tactical Withdrawal
effect: All allies disengage simultaneously without provoking reactions. The whole party repositions.
narration_cue: 'Fall back — now, together!'
